# AI Photo Journey

> AI Photo Journey builds a family of five AI creativity apps for iPhone and iPad. Each app does one thing exceptionally well — enhancing, generating, animating, face-swapping — with no accounts, no skill required, and results in seconds. All apps are free to try on the App Store with optional PRO subscriptions.

## The apps

- [FxAI](https://ai-photo-journey.com/apps/fxai): All-in-one AI photo enhancer — retouch, restore, edit, erase. Site: https://fxai.app
- [Photix](https://ai-photo-journey.com/apps/photix): AI image generation, conversational photo editing, and themed avatars. Site: https://photix.app
- [Videx](https://ai-photo-journey.com/apps/videx): AI text-to-video and photo-to-video generator with ten styles. Site: https://videx.app
- [SwapTo](https://ai-photo-journey.com/apps/swapto): AI face swap into 310 curated scenes, avatars, and glam filters. Site: https://swapto.app
- [PicAlive](https://ai-photo-journey.com/apps/picalive): One-tap photo-to-video animation that brings still photos to life. Site: https://picalive.app

## Company pages

- [Home](https://ai-photo-journey.com/): The whole family at a glance
- [About](https://ai-photo-journey.com/about): Who we are and what we believe
- [Contact](https://ai-photo-journey.com/contact): General inquiries and per-app support
